rules.message: No revenue logged in the last 30 days. First-revenue phase is stalling — ship and invoice.
Habit completion has dropped under 60% over the last 7 days. Discipline is drifting.
At least one annual target is in critical status. Re-plan or re-sequence before the gap compounds.
No new backtests in 7 days while the trading gate is LOCKED. The gate will never clear without reps.
A zero-mastery subtopic sits inside a high-weight topic. High exam leverage is being left untouched.
